skills_used.description: Names of all skills used, in the order applied (empty array if none)

summary.description: 1-3 sentences: what was done, the defaults chosen, or why blocked

pr_url.description: URL of the pull request opened, or empty string if none

review_id.description: The WCC review id this run created/used (the story id slug), or empty string

waiting_on.description: When status is needs_human: the WCC thread key(s) a human reply is expected in (e.g. 'general' or 'app/models/pricing.rb#0#L47'). Empty array otherwise.
